tweets.full_text:
Get ready, friends. Anthropic appears to be preparing the release of its Mythos-level model.

Pricing: $16 per 1M input tokens / $80 per 1M output tokens.

The release is likely very close, possibly even in the same week as GPT-5.6. Competition is heating up again.

Gemini 3.5 https://t.co/xchCy6DU6a
tweets.summary: Anthropic即将发布Mythos级别模型，定价$16/百万输入tokens、$80/百万输出tokens，可能与GPT-5.6同周发布。大模型价格战升级。

tweets.full_text:
Each time we release a model, we run the same test: give it code that trains a small AI model, ask the new model to speed it up. It takes a skilled human 4-8 hours to reach 4x faster.

In May 2024, Claude Opus 4 averaged a ~3x speedup. This April, Mythos Preview achieved ~52x.
tweets.summary: Claude Opus 4在代码优化测试中达到3倍加速，而Mythos Preview突破52倍加速，展示AI自我改进的指数级进展。
angles: 52倍加速！AI自我优化突破天花板
从3x到52x：Claude进化的指数级跳跃
AI开始自己改进自己，人类工程师要失业？

tweets.full_text:
We just published internal data on how much of Claude's development is already being done by Claude:
- Over 80% of all code merged into our codebase is now written by Claude
- It's been months since many researchers at Anthropic hand-wrote code
- The typical Anthropic engineer
tweets.summary: Anthropic内部数据：80%代码由Claude编写，多数研究员已停止手写代码，展示AI自动化开发的深度渗透。
angles: 80%代码由Claude写：程序员真的要失业了
Anthropic内部数据曝光：AI已接管开发
从工具到主力：Claude成为开发主角

tweets.full_text:
Someone hid a self-replicating worm inside 37 npm packages.

Written in Rust.

Hidden behind an eBPF kernel rootkit.

Talking to its operator over Tor.

It steals 86 environment variables.

AWS keys. GCP keys. Vault secrets. Kubernetes tokens.

Your Anthropic API key. Your OpenAI https://t.co/jx8VTCN106
tweets.summary: 发现37个npm包中隐藏自复制蠕虫，使用Rust编写、eBPF内核rootkit、Tor通信，窃取86个环境变量包括API密钥。这是严重的供应链安全威胁。
angles: 震撼：37个npm包暗藏自复制蠕虫，窃取API密钥
供应链危机：Rust编写的eBPF rootkit首次现身
开发者警惕：npm包中的Tor通信恶意软件

tweets.full_text:
We’re going all in on World Models.

Today we’re launching the 1X World Model Lab.

The bet is simple:

You can’t fine-tune your way to AGI.

And you definitely can’t fine-tune your way to robots that can operate in the physical world.

General-purpose humanoids need models that https://t.co/UBtKLFm8WD
